default_binding.THRESHOLD: the old Guild of Junior Inventors hall on Cog Lane
default_binding.ROUTE_M_LURE: framed by a wall of little labeled drawers
default_binding.ROUTE_G_TASK: restoring the town square's four-season fountain clock
default_binding.ROUTE_L_TASK: building gliders and racing message pigeons
default_binding.ROUTE_M_TASK: inventing helpers for the Market Street shopkeepers

slots.meaning: The guild's home building where the story opens and every junior is admitted.
slots.guidance: A welcoming, wonder-filled workshop building with a memorable street address; safe, no hazards.

slots.meaning: The head of the guild who runs the entrance trial and assigns new juniors to a workshop.
slots.guidance: A kind, sharply observant adult judge; appears only in the shared opening scenes, not within any one workshop's summer.

slots.meaning: The item a new junior presents to be admitted to the guild.
slots.guidance: A small, ordinary object proving acceptance; no ceremony required beyond holding it.

slots.meaning: The short hands-on trial every new junior takes before being assigned a workshop.
slots.guidance: A brief build-something challenge that reveals character (how a junior handles failure), not just skill.

slots.meaning: The street the guild's gadget-workshop door opens directly onto.
slots.guidance: A lived-in commercial street with a handful of shopkeepers; ordinary, safe, bustling.

slots.meaning: The short name of the gears-workshop route.
slots.guidance: A one or two word workshop name a kid would say out loud when picking it.

slots.meaning: The named end-of-summer event the gears workshop is racing to be ready for.
slots.guidance: A festival, contest, or showcase day; exciting, public, and clearly dated; never itself dangerous.

slots.meaning: The adult expert who runs the gears workshop all summer.
slots.guidance: A skilled, patient adult craftsperson mentor; kind but exacting; never a source of danger.

slots.meaning: The other junior working in the gears workshop who starts out as friendly-rival competition.
slots.guidance: A same-age junior with more experience in this workshop; prickly at first, becomes a genuine ally.

slots.meaning: The short name of the gliders-workshop route.
slots.guidance: A one or two word workshop name a kid would say out loud when picking it.

slots.meaning: The named end-of-summer event the gliders workshop is racing to be ready for.
slots.guidance: A festival, contest, or showcase day; exciting, public, and clearly dated; never itself dangerous.

slots.meaning: The adult expert who runs the gliders workshop all summer.
slots.guidance: A skilled, patient adult craftsperson mentor; kind but exacting; never a source of danger.

slots.meaning: The other junior working in the gliders workshop who starts out as friendly-rival competition.
slots.guidance: A same-age junior with more experience in this workshop; prickly at first, becomes a genuine ally.

slots.meaning: The short name of the gadgets-workshop route.
slots.guidance: A one or two word workshop name a kid would say out loud when picking it.

slots.meaning: The named end-of-summer event the gadgets workshop is racing to be ready for.
slots.guidance: A festival, contest, or showcase day; exciting, public, and clearly dated; never itself dangerous.

slots.meaning: The adult expert who runs the gadgets workshop all summer.
slots.guidance: A skilled, patient adult craftsperson mentor; kind but exacting; never a source of danger.

slots.meaning: The other junior working in the gadgets workshop who starts out as friendly-rival competition.
slots.guidance: A same-age junior with more experience in this workshop; prickly at first, becomes a genuine ally.

slots.meaning: The visual detail on the Gears workshop's door at the very first choice.
slots.guidance: A short, inviting glimpse of clockwork craft; distinguishable from the other two doors.

slots.meaning: The visual detail on the Gliders workshop's door at the very first choice.
slots.guidance: A short, inviting glimpse of flight craft; distinguishable from the other two doors.

slots.meaning: The visual detail on the Gadgets workshop's door at the very first choice.
slots.guidance: A short, inviting glimpse of tinkering craft; distinguishable from the other two doors.

slots.meaning: The one-line summary of the Gears workshop's summer project, given at the sorting moment.
slots.guidance: A short phrase naming the big fix-it project; achievable-sounding, not overwhelming.

slots.meaning: The one-line summary of the Gliders workshop's summer project, given at the sorting moment.
slots.guidance: A short phrase naming the flight-craft project; achievable-sounding, not overwhelming.

slots.meaning: The one-line summary of the Gadgets workshop's summer project, given at the sorting moment.
slots.guidance: A short phrase naming the helper-building project; achievable-sounding, not overwhelming.

slots.meaning: The rival junior's champion animal partner, undefeated for several seasons before this summer.
slots.guidance: A skilled, likeable working animal; a source of pride and, later, a hidden vulnerability, never of danger.

slots.meaning: The home base for the Gliders workshop's messenger-animal program.
slots.guidance: A cozy, purpose-built shelter for the workshop's message-carrying partners.

slots.meaning: One of four seasonal figures on the town clock; this one represents spring.
slots.guidance: A small mechanical figure needing careful, patient repair; charming, not eerie.

slots.meaning: One of four seasonal figures on the town clock; this one represents summer.
slots.guidance: A small mechanical figure whose repair centers on forging and tempering a new spring part.

slots.meaning: One of four seasonal figures on the town clock; this one represents autumn.
slots.guidance: A small mechanical figure; the rival junior's own side project.

slots.meaning: One of four seasonal figures on the town clock; this one represents winter.
slots.guidance: A small mechanical figure whose repair centers on freeing a seized internal part with a press.

slots.meaning: The set of tower bells and their striking mechanism, restored in the second Gears sub-project.
slots.guidance: A named chiming mechanism; the sound is delightful, never alarming.

slots.meaning: The large mill wheel below the square that powers the whole clock mechanism.
slots.guidance: A big, safely-accessed mechanical wheel; jammed with old debris, not dangerous to approach.

slots.meaning: The precise clockwork part that keeps the tower's timing honest; the object of the escapement sub-plot.
slots.guidance: A small, skill-testing precision part; failing to make it well is a craft setback, never a safety issue.

slots.meaning: The long-lost mechanism that lowers the fountain basin so the parade can run without getting the figures wet.
slots.guidance: An old, forgotten valve-like mechanism; a rediscovered piece of the clock's original design.

slots.meaning: The ceremonial key used to wind the great clock weight at the festival's climax.
slots.guidance: A single symbolic, honor-bearing object; handed to whoever the story gives credit to.

slots.meaning: The battered practice glider the hero inherits to rebuild for the derby.
slots.guidance: A well-worn hand-me-down flying machine, structurally sound under its damage.

slots.meaning: The long, patient wing design built for the derby's high, slow route.
slots.guidance: A graceful long-winged glider; steady and forgiving to fly once trimmed.

slots.meaning: The short, quick wing design built for the derby's fast, low route.
slots.guidance: A twitchy, exciting short-winged glider; unforgiving of a sloppy launch.

slots.meaning: The new twin-rail launcher improvised from storm wreckage after the original launch rail is destroyed.
slots.guidance: A bold, faster-launching invention built under time pressure; thrilling but untested.

slots.meaning: The fixed launch-rail infrastructure gliders are released from.
slots.guidance: Ordinary roof-mounted launch equipment; a storm can damage it, but it is not itself hazardous.

slots.meaning: The small capsule a message-carrying bird wears to hold its message, weighed for fairness in races.
slots.guidance: A tiny, lightweight carried object; the choice of capsule is a fairness-versus-speed dilemma, not a danger.

slots.meaning: The riskiest of the three post-race legs, flown home through worsening weather.
slots.guidance: A weather-tested endurance race leg; challenging but survivable with the right safety protocol.

slots.meaning: The short, fast post-race leg that rewards raw speed.
slots.guidance: A brisk, straightforward race leg between two fixed points.

slots.meaning: The hero's own young message-carrying animal partner for the summer.
slots.guidance: A small, thoughtful working animal; deliberate rather than reckless, a source of pride not peril.

slots.meaning: The street baker whose four-in-the-morning routine the hero is assigned to help.
slots.guidance: A warm, overworked shopkeeper with an honest, solvable scheduling problem.

slots.meaning: The street greengrocer whose tilted, tram-shaken display the hero is assigned to help.
slots.guidance: A good-humored shopkeeper whose display problem is genuinely tricky, not merely careless.

slots.meaning: The invented device that tracks proofing/baking time across the baker's several ovens.
slots.guidance: A clever small timekeeping helper; safe around food and heat.

slots.meaning: The invented device that carries heavy trays up the baker's narrow stair.
slots.guidance: A counterweighted small hoist; must be shown safe (guarded) before use near people.

slots.meaning: The invented device that absorbs the passing tram's shudder so the greengrocer's display stays still.
slots.guidance: A tuned shock-absorbing helper; the build-versus-test dilemma is about permission and patience, not hazard.

slots.meaning: The invented device that gently catches and returns apples that roll free of the tilted display.
slots.guidance: A padded, non-destructive catching helper; safe for produce and passersby alike.

slots.meaning: The Inventor's Fair's special session where every helper runs live at its own real shopfront.
slots.guidance: A judged, working demonstration morning across the whole street.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the fast-quenched forge spring shatters, missing the fourth figure at the festival (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: skipping the tower entirely to master springs across all four figures (neutral discovery).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the improvised press cracks the winter figure's crown gear, leaving three figures to parade (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the parade runs on a drained basin, safe and celebrated (success).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the recovered drain gate lets the parade run over real flowing water (success).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: working the hidden drain mechanism out of sight while the rival takes the visible honor (neutral discovery).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: patched paddles fail and choke the wheel on test morning (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: a summer spent carving proper paddles reveals a trade the hero is suited for (neutral discovery).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: hand-ringing the bells without the true anchor, a near-perfect stopgap (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the finished anchor lets the hero wind the town's first honest noon in twenty years (success).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: conducting bells, wheel, and figures together as one timed performance (success).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: an untested surprise chime rings four minutes late in front of the crowd (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: flying the long-wing solo, the glider drifts off course into a market awning (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the hero becomes known for tuning other fliers' wings rather than winning outright (neutral discovery).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: a copied launch-release hook misfires at the trials (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the safely rebuilt single launch rail earns a strong derby placing (success).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the new twin-rail launcher wins the fastest recorded run on the low route (success).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: choosing the untried high route reveals a rising-air path nobody had charted (neutral discovery).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: a too-light message capsule voids the young pigeon's record-breaking sprint (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the honestly-trained pigeon takes second place but earns a working role (neutral discovery).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: proving the storm-flight protocol alone breaks a safety rule and costs the trials (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: two message-birds, one young and one veteran, complete the storm route together (completion).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the veteran champion bird finally flies through the weather it always avoided (success).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: launching ahead of the safety schedule to chase a record backfires safely (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the finished small proofing-clock draws no ribbon but a paying repeat customer (neutral discovery).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the overreaching eight-oven clock tangles itself in front of the judges (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: the finished, safety-caged lift helper wins its own special recognition (success).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: an improvised brake fails and spills a basket of goods down the street (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: patient overnight data-gathering (not a rushed test) earns second place and a buyer for the data itself (neutral discovery).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: testing the invention on the street without permission draws a penalty (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: polishing a solo entry instead of helping a struggling neighbor costs the row its ribbon (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: standing by a neighbor's rescued invention instead of one's own wins the shared ribbon (success).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: every stall's helper runs together and the whole row is honored as one invention (completion).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).

slots.meaning: Ending title: moving a helper to a flashier spot away from the real problem it was built for backfires (setback).
slots.guidance: Short evocative ending name (title-cased); tone matches the ending's valence (setback/discovery/success/completion).
